resources.string:
This is a free app. To be able to support myself and my family, I will show you some few ads. Those ads WILL NOT be based on your activities. You can change this in the app.

Here you can read my privacy policy:

https://onenice.monster/awesomerobot/?action=pp

Personalized ads will use the data collected from you to show you ads targeted to your activities. Non personalized ads will show you generic ads.

Here you can read my privacy policy:

https://onenice.monster/awesomerobot/?action=pp
